title: Draft Queue
description: Schema for outreach drafts waiting for founder approval. No draft moves to 'sent' status without founder explicit approval. | مخطط قائمة مسودات التواصل — لا تغادر أي مسودة دون موافقة المؤسس.

draft_id.description: Unique draft identifier. Format: DQ- followed by 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters. | معرّف المسودة الفريد.

dossier_id.description: Reference to the Persuasion Dossier that generated this draft. Links to PERSUASION_DOSSIER_SCHEMA.json. | مرجع ملف الإقناع المرتبط.

channel.description: Channel this draft is intended for. Must match the channel approved in the Persuasion Dossier. | القناة المستهدفة لهذه المسودة.

recipient_label.description: Anonymized or role-based label for the recipient — no PII (no full name, no personal email, no phone). Example: 'Operations Director — FM Company, Riyadh'. | تسمية المستلم بدون بيانات شخصية.

recipient_email.description: Professional/corporate email address of the recipient. Only company email — no personal gmail/hotmail. Must be redacted in any exported report. | البريد الإلكتروني المهني — يُخفى في التقارير.

recipient_linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL. Only populated for linkedin_manual channel. | رابط LinkedIn للقناة اليدوية فقط.

subject.description: Subject line in both languages. | سطر الموضوع بكلتا اللغتين.

ar.description: Subject line in Arabic. | الموضوع بالعربية.

en.description: Subject line in English. | الموضوع بالإنجليزية.

body_ar.description: Full message body in Arabic. Maximum 150 words per outreach writing rules. | نص الرسالة بالعربية — 150 كلمة كحد أقصى.

body_en.description: Full message body in English. Maximum 150 words per outreach writing rules. | نص الرسالة بالإنجليزية.

language_sent.description: The language version actually sent. Determined by buyer_persona.language_preference. | اللغة التي أُرسلت بها الرسالة فعلياً.

status.description: draft: generated, awaiting review. approved: founder approved. sent: delivered to recipient. rejected: founder rejected with reason. parked: delayed for 30+ days. | حالة المسودة.

rejection_reason.description: Required when status = rejected. Records why the founder rejected this draft. | سبب الرفض — إلزامي عند الرفض.

follow_up_sequence.description: Which follow-up sequence this draft belongs to. Reference FOLLOW_UP_SEQUENCES.md. | سلسلة المتابعة التي تنتمي إليها هذه المسودة.

sequence_day.description: Day in the follow-up sequence (0 = first touch, 1 = day 1 follow-up, etc.). | اليوم في سلسلة المتابعة.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this draft was generated. ISO 8601 format. | وقت إنشاء المسودة.

approved_at.description: Timestamp when founder approved this draft. Null until approved. | وقت موافقة المؤسس.

sent_at.description: Timestamp when message was actually sent. Null until sent. | وقت الإرسال الفعلي.

reply_received.description: Flag set to true when a reply is received from the recipient. | تم الرد على هذه الرسالة.

reply_classification.description: Classification of the reply or outcome. Set after tracking window closes. | تصنيف الرد.

next_action.description: Recommended next action based on reply classification. Populated by agent, reviewed by founder. | الإجراء التالي الموصى به.

notes.description: Free-text notes from founder or agent. No PII. | ملاحظات إضافية.
